title: True Combat
body:
# **True Combat**
## **A 1.21.3 Souls-like Minecraft datapack**

- This datapack adds mechanics and elements from souls-like series like Dark Souls, Sekiro, Bloodborne, etc.
- This adds a few customizable elements like Stats leveling, Passives, and Active Skills.
- This enhances the combat by adding mechanics like Blocking, Stamina System, Parry-and-Riposte, Dashing, Backstab, and Poise break(Reaching 0 stamina). Getting damaged, Attacking, Dashing, and using Active Skills depletes stamina.
- Most Hostile and Neutral mobs have Stamina, and Armed Humanoid Mobs(Armed means holding a Sword or an Axe) can Block and perform Parry-and-Riposte. For mobs with stamina, damaging them depletes their stamina.
- This datapack adds more weaponry: Katana, Knife, Rapier, Longsword, Spear, Anchor, Greatsword, Battleaxe, and Scythe.
- Forging these weapons requires a few new items and steps which the game gives a book for instructions and tips, and a YT video for a guide.﻿
- This datapack also adds a few extra weapons like the Throwable Knife, Bolas, Smoke Bomb, Bomb, and Blunderbuss. The game also provides a guide book for the crafting recipes of these items.


To access your Character sheet, enter:

```
/﻿trigger player_stats
```

To give you the new items the datapack adds, simply enter:

```
/function lor_datapack:commands/give_item/
```

and scroll through the list of items, then hit Enter


﻿To reset your Character Sheet via commands, enter:

```
﻿/function lor_datapack:commands/full_reset
```
